use_cases: Selecting rotation angles in design and creative tools
Setting directional values in mapping or navigation interfaces
Configuring time values in clock-based or schedule pickers
Choosing positions in video or image editing software
Setting angular values in data visualization or chart configurations
ai_summary: A circular angle slider component built on Ark UI that allows users to select angle values by dragging a knob around a ring track. Features gradient styling with blue-to-purple coloring, SVG-based track and progress circles, and dark mode support. The slider uses CSS custom properties for smooth value-based rendering and includes accessibility features through the Ark UI library.
